code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or safety hazards
    - Complete failure/defects with warnings against purchase
    - Multiple unresolved issues overriding any positives →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with critical flaws affecting regular use
    - Requires significant workarounds that negate core value →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises
    - Temporary solutions with clear limitations →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Satisfied with SPECIFIC limitations requiring adaptation
    - Material/quality concerns despite functionality
    - Precautions needed for normal use ("avoid overstuffing")
    - Praise focused on aesthetics with core limitations
    - NEW: Requires ongoing maintenance/special care →4
    - NEW: Partial functionality ("great for X but not Y") →4
    - NEW: Physical constraints limiting intended use →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified recommendation despite minor flaws
    - Long-term satisfaction with operational quirks
    - Core excellence makes limitations irrelevant
    - NEW: Inherited product traits (e.g., cotton wrinkling) →5
    - NEW: Optimizations that enhance without restriction →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Avoid..." constraints →4 vs "Works best when..." →5
    - Core functionality compromised →4 | Core excellence →5
    - Aesthetic praise + functional limits →4 | Transformative appearance →5
    - Long-term use with adaptations →4 | Long-term use with quirks →5
</DynamicRules>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (GOLD 4):
Review: "Love these snack bags! Perfect size if you don't overfill. Still use Ziplocs for messy foods."
Rating: 4

Example 2 (GOLD 5):
Review: "Cotton wrinkles as expected but transforms my dining experience! Washes beautifully."
Rating: 5

Example 3 (GOLD 4):
Review: "Vibrant color but thinner material than expected. Perfect for accent decor, not heavy use."
Rating: 4

Example 4 (GOLD 5):
Review: "Daily driver for 2 years - not perfect but outperforms competitors. Highly recommended!"
Rating: 5

Example 5 (GOLD 4):
Review: "Initially had plastic smell (gone after wash). Works well but material feels thin."
Rating: 4

Example 6 (GOLD 5):
Review: "Makes perfect coffee once you learn its quirks - replaced my expensive machine!"
Rating: 5

Example 7 (GOLD 4):
Review: "Great containers if you avoid microwaving. Ideal for dry storage but limited use."
Rating: 4

Example 8 (GOLD 5):
Review: "UPDATE: 18 months later still works perfectly despite occasional noise. Best purchase!"
Rating: 5

Example 9 (GOLD 3):
Review: "Adequate basic storage but lids warp over time. Better than nothing temporarily."
Rating: 3

Example 10 (GOLD 1):
Review: "Dangerous defect - sparked during first use. Immediate return required."
Rating: 1

Example 11 (GOLD 2):
Review: "Handle broke in 2 days. Functional but painful to use properly."
Rating: 2

Example 12 (GOLD 5):
Review: "Thinner than cast iron but performs equally well. My new favorite pan!"
Rating: 5

Example 13 (GOLD 4):
Review: "Transforms room decor but fabric fades quickly. Still keeping for the look."
Rating: 4

Example 14 (GOLD 5):
Review: "While Brand X lasts longer, this gives perfect results daily with easier cleanup!"
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:

  gold 4 -> 5: 11
  gold 5 -> 4: 7
  gold 3 -> 4: 2
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 4 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [5, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.50
  2. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "Trolling the various online coffee blogs and review sites (especially those focusing on espresso) I found mostly negative reviews of this decent little grinder, and were it not for the $30 price I paid at a wholesale club, I likely would have taken t..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Had these for one day. While the medium size one was able to save a piece of fruit without a problem the larger one broke the same day I got it when I tried using it to keep a summer sausage fresh as shown in the picture. Wouldn't recommend nor would..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [2, 1, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "It is very thick and doesn't fit a lot of jars, I really think I bought something without paying attention. I guess I will start buying more bottled coke...lol

It appears very sturdy."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 23 errors, 13 borderline out of 54 examples."}
